intro: Between April 8 and April 21, 2026, ZCyberNews published 24 articles on AI-related threats. The threat actor Pushpaganda was a primary focus, with campaigns targeting critical_infrastructure, finance, government, manufacturing, and technology sectors. These activities were most reported in the United states, Asia, Australia, Canada, and Japan. The severity of the covered incidents varied, including 10 high-severity reports, 10 informational updates, 1 critical alert, and 3 medium-level threats.
